sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array (id UInt32, arr1 Array(Int32), arr2 Array(Int32));
SELECT id, hasSubstr(arr1, arr2) AS contains_order FROM test_array;
UPDATE test_array SET arr2 = [1, 2, 3] WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, hasSubstr(arr1, arr2) AS is_prefix FROM test_array WHERE hasSubstr(arr1, arr2) = 1;
